title: Behavior Raid Garden
description: Allows the mob to eat crops out of farms until they are full.

blocks.description: Block identifiers the entity considers as garden crops.

eat_delay.description: Time in ticks between eating each block.

full_delay.description: Time in ticks before the entity stops raiding after eating.

goal_radius.description: Distance in blocks at which the entity is considered to have reached the crop.

max_to_eat.description: Maximum number of blocks the entity will eat per raid.
